languages.text: Имя цепных псов чемпиона Хаоса, 32-го меровского полка, раскаленным стилом было вписано в летописи Простора Коронус. Жестокие и беспощадные убийцы, заливающие кровью целые планеты, наводили ужас на всех, кто посмел противостоять их главнокомандующему.

The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.
languages.original_text: Имя цепных псов чемпиона Хаоса, 32-го меровского полка, раскаленным стилом было вписано в летописи Простора Коронус. Жестокие и беспощадные убийцы, заливающие кровью целые планеты, наводили ужас на всех, кто посмел противостоять их главнокомандующему.

traits.locale_text: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

languages.text: カオスのチャンピオンである32番メローヴ連隊の攻撃犬は、コロナス・エクスパンションの記録に赤い熱い筆で記された。惑星全体を血に染める残虐で容赦ない殺戮者たちは、彼らの総司令官に抵抗する者たちを恐怖に陥れた。
languages.original_text: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

traits.locale_text: カオスのチャンピオンである32番メローヴ連隊の攻撃犬は、コロナス・エクスパンションの記録に赤い熱い筆で記された。惑星全体を血に染める残虐で容赦ない殺戮者たちは、彼らの総司令官に抵抗する者たちを恐怖に陥れた。

languages.text: 作为混沌神选者的恶犬，梅罗夫第32团用炽热的鲜血之笔，将自己写入了科罗努斯扩区的史册。这帮杀手残忍无情，将整颗行星淹没在血海之中，让所有胆敢反抗其指挥官的人闻风丧胆。
languages.original_text: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

traits.locale_text: 作为混沌神选者的恶犬，梅罗夫第32团用炽热的鲜血之笔，将自己写入了科罗努斯扩区的史册。这帮杀手残忍无情，将整颗行星淹没在血海之中，让所有胆敢反抗其指挥官的人闻风丧胆。

languages.text: Le 32e régiment de Merov, les chiens de garde {mf|du champion|de la championne} du Chaos, laissa sa marque au fer rouge dans les annales des Étendues de Koronus. Ces tueurs aussi brutaux qu'impitoyables inondaient des planètes entières de sang et frappaient de terreur tous ceux qui osaient s'opposer à leur {mf|commandant|commandante} en chef.
languages.original_text: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

traits.locale_text: Le 32e régiment de Merov, les chiens de garde {mf|du champion|de la championne} du Chaos, laissa sa marque au fer rouge dans les annales des Étendues de Koronus. Ces tueurs aussi brutaux qu'impitoyables inondaient des planètes entières de sang et frappaient de terreur tous ceux qui osaient s'opposer à leur {mf|commandant|commandante} en chef.

languages.text: El nombre de la vanguardia de{mf|l| la} {mf|campeón|campeona} del Caos, el 32.º regimiento de Merov, quedó grabado en sangre en los anales de la Extensión de Koronus. Sus asesinos brutales y despiadados empapaban planetas enteros de sangre y sembraban el terror en cuantos osaban oponerse a su comandante.
languages.original_text: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

traits.locale_text: El nombre de la vanguardia de{mf|l| la} {mf|campeón|campeona} del Caos, el 32.º regimiento de Merov, quedó grabado en sangre en los anales de la Extensión de Koronus. Sus asesinos brutales y despiadados empapaban planetas enteros de sangre y sembraban el terror en cuantos osaban oponerse a su comandante.

languages.text: Kaos müdafisinin tazısı olan 32. Merov Alayı, Koronus Enginliği'nin yıllıklarına kızgın bir kalemle yazıldı. Bütün gezegenleri kana bulayan acımasız ve merhametsiz katiller, başkomutanlarına karşı çıkmaya cüret eden herkese dehşet saçtı.
languages.original_text: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.

traits.locale_text: Kaos müdafisinin tazısı olan 32. Merov Alayı, Koronus Enginliği'nin yıllıklarına kızgın bir kalemle yazıldı. Bütün gezegenleri kana bulayan acımasız ve merhametsiz katiller, başkomutanlarına karşı çıkmaya cüret eden herkese dehşet saçtı.

languages.text: Die Kampfhunde des Champions des Chaos, das 32. Merov-Regiment, wurde in die Annalen der Koronus-Ausdehnung eingebrannt. Als brutale und gnadenlose Killer, die ganze Planeten in Blut tränkten, brachten sie Angst und Schrecken über alle Gegner {mf|ihres Oberbefehlshabers|ihrer Oberbefehlshaberin}.
languages.original_text: The attack dogs of the champion of Chaos, the 32nd Merov Regiment was written into the annals of the Koronus Expanse with a red-hot stylus. Brutal and merciless killers who drenched entire planets in blood, they struck terror in all who dared oppose their commander-in-chief.
